title: Safe Foraging Basics
subject: Life Science
description: Learn to identify edible and poisonous plants that you might encounter in the wild.

cards.back: EDIBLE! The entire plant is safe. Leaves can be eaten raw or boiled, flowers are sweet, and roots can be roasted as a coffee substitute.
TOXIC! Do not touch or burn. Causes severe skin rashes due to urushiol oil. Remember: 'Leaves of three, let it be!'
EDIBLE! Steep in hot (but not boiling) water to make a pine needle tea which is extremely high in Vitamin C.
DANGEROUS! A good rule of thumb: 10% of white/yellow wild berries are edible (90% toxic). Avoid them completely.
